title: DeploymentTarget
content:
# DeploymentTarget


## Properties

- **type** (`string`): Type of target to deploy the application to.

- `cluster`: Deploy the application to a specific cluster, and optionally to a specific node.
- `resource-cluster`: Deploy the application to the cluster specified by the resource property `cluster`.
- **cluster** (`object`):

type.description:
Type of target to deploy the application to.

- `cluster`: Deploy the application to a specific cluster, and optionally to a specific node.
- `resource-cluster`: Deploy the application to the cluster specified by the resource property `cluster`.

name.description: Cluster to deploy the application to.

node_name.description: Node to deploy the application to.
